name: Chicken Poached with Star Anise
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 cups Chinese rice wine or dry sherry
1 Chicken, skinned and trussed (3.5 to 4 lbs)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except chicken, sesame oil, and garnishes in a deep pot large enough to hold the chicken.
2. Bring to a boil.
3. Add the chicken and simmer for 40-50 minutes, or until cooked through. Turn the bird occasionally to ensure even poaching.
4. Skim any fat that rises to the surface with a shallow ladle.
5. The chicken is done when juices run clear when pierced with a skewer in the thigh's thick part.
6. Drain the chicken and reserve the broth. Remove the trussing string, carve the chicken into pieces, and sprinkle with scallion greens (whites left whole) and cilantro for garnish.
7. Serve hot, at room temperature, or chilled. Place chicken in shallow soup bowls topped with broth, then sprinkle with chopped scallions and cilantro. Alternatively, brush chicken pieces with sesame oil and brown them on the grill or under the broiler before sprinkling with chopped scallions and cilantro.
Note: The broth can be reused by straining it, letting it cool to room temperature, refrigerating overnight, and skimming off any fat that collects on top. Freeze in portions for later use. To reuse, bring the broth to a boil, adding seasoning and water as needed. Each use improves the flavor.
